notes: The canonical accessible source is the public FinAI wrapper TheFinAI/flare-sm-cikm pinned to a concrete HF revision.
The original first-party CIKM18 release is publicly unrecoverable from the author repo plus linked Baidu Pan surface, so this module is wrapper-based rather than an original-author release.
The wrapper split is preserved exactly as observed and is not reconstructed or reshuffled.
Public documentation drifts relative to original-paper CIKM18 semantics on row counts, threshold wording, and metric wording; those drifts are documented rather than treated as canonical truth.
The public wrapper sits over a source chain involving market data and social text, so publication carries an upstream/source-chain caution.
The wrapper train/valid/test split is preserved exactly as observed in the pinned Hugging Face dataset revision.
ST312 does not reconstruct or infer the original paper split in this wrapper-based module.
The original first-party CIKM18 release remains publicly unrecoverable from first-party surfaces.

hf_publish.upstream_license_note: The wrapper itself is public, but the underlying original dataset family is unrecoverable and built from social text plus market data. Upstream/source-chain terms should be reviewed before reuse.
